steps.title: Translate Elena's amount
steps.content:
Elena has $3$ times as many dollars as Noor. Since Elena has $e$ dollars and Noor has $n$ dollars, this means
$$e=3n$$

steps.title: Translate the total
steps.content:
Together, they have $48$ dollars, so their amounts add to $48$.
$$e+n=48$$

steps.title: Choose the matching system
steps.content:
The system must include both the relationship between the two amounts and the total amount.
$$e=3n$$
$$e+n=48$$
The answer is A.
